headline: Is It Time To Reassess VICI Properties (VICI) After Mixed Recent Share Price Returns?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether VICI Properties at around US$28.79 is offering good value right now, or if the stock price already reflects most of its potential. Over the last week the stock recorded a 1.4% decline, while the 30 day return is 3.4% and the year to date return is 2.3%, with a 1 year return of a 3.2% decline that contrasts with a 3 year return of 6.7% and a 5 year return of 24.7%. Recent attention on VICI Properties has focused on its position in the real estate sector and...
